_comment: Cursor hook bindings for agent-daemon. Copy to .cursor/hooks.json (per-project) or merge into Cursor's global hook config. Requires `ad` on PATH (npm link from agent-daemon/runtime). Shape adapted from everything-claude-code/.cursor/hooks.json (MIT).

sessionStart.description: Inject agent-daemon constitution + project memory at session start

sessionEnd.description: Run digest pipeline to extract learnings from the session

beforeShellExecution.description: Block `git --no-verify` and dev-server-without-tmux; warn on `git push` (developer/security profiles)

afterShellExecution.description: Surface `gh pr create` URLs and `npm run build` completions on stderr

afterFileEdit.description: Warn when `console.log` is left in JS/TS files just edited

beforeMCPExecution.description: Append every MCP call to ~/.agent-daemon/audit/mcp.jsonl and warn on untrusted servers (security profile)

preCompact.description: Snapshot activeContext.md before Cursor compacts context
